captions.01.jpeg: A water leak caused the tape in this ceiling to come loose. It needed to be re-taped, floated, textured, primed and painted
captions.02.jpeg: The completed project looks like it never happened.
captions.03.jpeg: This Allendale home was going to be put up for sale but this pet damaged window sill was going to need to be replaced first
captions.04.jpeg: Her large dogs really did a number on this window sill
captions.05.mp4: I was able to fabricate a new one that snapped into placeand found a stain that was a perfect match to the existing wood.
captions.06.mp4: I also came up with a solution to keep the dogs from damaging the new one
